underlying_goal: Guide Claude through understanding the SkogAI project philosophy, specifically how @-linking works in CLAUDE.md networks, why lean context management matters, and how Claude should manage its own context in a fundamentally different way than the default Anthropic approach
friction_detail: Claude initially treated context as static storage/curation problem rather than dynamic navigation, which the user had to correct by explaining the SkogAI philosophy of temporal context management.
brief_summary: User guided Claude through understanding the SkogAI lean-context philosophy and @-linking system, and Claude eventually grasped the paradigm shift from static context loading to dynamic context navigation after initial misunderstanding.
